node.constraint: Initialize better-sqlite3 database 'shop.db'. Create an 'orders' table (columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, totalAmount REAL, itemsCount INTEGER, date TEXT, fullName TEXT, address TEXT) if not exists. Support POST: reads all items in 'cart', calculates total sum, inserts a new order row, clears the 'cart' table, and returns the generated orderId. Support GET: returns all orders history sorted by date descending.

Create a checkout form page at app/checkout/page.tsx (Amazon multi-step styling). Display shipping fields (Full Name, Address, City, Zip). Display cart summary, calculate total, and show a 'Place your order' yellow button that POSTs to '/api/checkout' and redirects to '/orders' with a success message.

Create an orders history view at app/orders/page.tsx. Fetch orders list from '/api/checkout' on mount. Display previous orders with order card columns (Order Placed date, Total Cost, Ship To address, Status: Delivered/Shipped mock status). Add a button linking back to '/products' to continue shopping.
